title: Automations via query / API
excerpt: Is it possible to generate custom automations like “If status changes to something, set date to today and move item to group” via a query to the API? I created a master that enables me to roll out new functions like new …

posts.author: annafeller97 (Anna Feller)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to generate custom automations like “If status changes to something, set date to today and move item to group” via a query to the API? I created a master that enables me to roll out new functions like new columns for all of my boards in a specific workspace, but it did not work for automations yet.

posts.author: Harsh (farioconsulting.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Anna,
You could directly “set the date today and move item to group” via the Monday API i.e there is no need to do the same via an automation.
